prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约13576名，2023年约13611名，2024年约14402名，2025年约15321名。2021至2025年整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1700名，2025年基准位次 约15321名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年57人，2023年52人，2024年30人，2025年26人，呈持续缩减趋势。2026年计划44人，较2025年大 幅扩招约69%，扩招幅度显著，将明显缓解竞争压力，推动位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2025年第180名、2026年第1 77名，排名稳定，属于体育类特色院校，综合排名处于全国中游偏后水平；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应及校园安全（排球比赛争议等）， 事件总数26件（0正面、11负面、15中性），负面舆情可能轻微影响考生报考意愿。抖音热度为高热（总排名第18位，综合热度264万），短视频平台曝光量大，反映学校关注度较 高，对报考热度有正向拉动作用。历史投档异常数据中未见北京体育大学相关记录；北京体育大学在。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关专业大类中，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业热度较高，而新闻传播、外语等文科类专业热度偏冷。该校招生专业以体育特色为主， 兼有新闻学、网络与新媒体、英语、汉语国际教育等文科专业，整体受专业热度分化影响有限。北京市2026年考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅 增加将加剧整体竞争，推动位次前移。；北京体育大学位于北京市，属于本地高校，在本省招生具有天然地域优势。2021年北京市 招生57人，2023年52人，2024年30人，2025年26人，本地招生占比呈下降趋势，但2026年回升至44人，显示该校对本市生源的重视程度有所恢复。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基 准位次15321名、2026年计划大幅扩招69%（推动位次后移）、北京市考生总数增长约29.7%（推动位次前移）、声誉偏负面（轻微降温）及抖音高热（升温）等多重因素，扩招效 应占主导但考生增加形成对冲。经，预测2026年最低位次约21385名，区间20885–21885名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间20885–21885名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如20000名以内）可重点冲刺新闻学、网络与新媒体等 热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如21500名以后）建议优先考虑三档体育特色专业，录取概率更高。该校体育类专业（运动人体科学、运动康复、智能体育工程等）依托学校顶尖 体育学科实力，就业方向明确，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest rank was approximately 13,576; in 2023, approximately 13,611; in 2024, approximately 14,402; in 2025, approximately 15,321. From 2021 to 2025, the overall trend is backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1,700 places in the last 3 years. The baseline rank for 2025 is approximately 15,321. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing: 57 in 2021, 52 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 26 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend. In 2026, the plan is 44, a significant expansion of about 69% compared to 2025, which will notably alleviate competition pressure and push the rank backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, with stable rankings. It is a sports-specific institution, with overall rankings at the middle-to-lower national level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and campus safety (e.g., volleyball match controversies). There are 26 total events (0 positive, 11 negative, 15 neutral). Negative public opinion may slightly affect candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is high (18th overall, comprehensive popularity 2.64 million), indicating high exposure on short video platforms, which positively boosts application enthusiasm. No historical abnormal admission data related to Beijing Sport University was found.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, among related major categories, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular, while liberal arts majors like Journalism and Foreign Languages are relatively cold. The university's enrollment majors are primarily sports-oriented, supplemented by liberal arts majors such as Journalism, Network and New Media, English, and Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, so the overall impact of major popularity differentiation is limited. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Beijing is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025. This significant increase in candidate numbers will intensify overall competition, pushing the rank forward. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a local university with natural regional advantages in local enrollment. In 2021, it enrolled 57 students in Beijing, 52 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, showing a declining proportion of local enrollment, but rebounding to 44 in 2026, indicating a recovery in emphasis on local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 15,321, the significant 69% expansion in the 2026 plan (pushing rank backward), the approximately 29.7% increase in total Beijing candidates (pushing rank forward), the slightly negative reputation (slight cooling), and high Douyin popularity (warming), the expansion effect dominates but is offset by the increase in candidates. After analysis, the predicted lowest rank for 2026 is approximately 21,385, with a range of 20,885–21,885.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 20,885–21,885, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20,000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Journalism and Network and New Media. If your rank is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 21,500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 sports-specific majors for higher admission probability. The university's sports majors (Kinesiology, Sports Rehabilitation, Intelligent Sports Engineering, etc.) leverage the school's top-tier sports discipline strength, with clear career directions, and are worth special attention.
